explanation: I've created a comprehensive phone support dashboard showing today's call activity, status distribution, and recent calls. This combines live Freshcaller data with sample ticket data to give you a complete view of today's phone support operations.

widgets.title: Phone Support Operations — Today
widgets.subtitle: Real-time call activity, ticket status, and team performance

widgets.title: Key Insight
widgets.subtitle: Phone channels typically have higher satisfaction scores than other support channels due to real-time resolution. Monitor call duration vs. resolution rate to optimize agent efficiency.

quickActions.label: Add Team Performance Breakdown
quickActions.prompt: Add a chart showing phone support performance by agent or team

quickActions.label: Create Call Volume Trend
quickActions.prompt: Add a line chart showing call volume over the past week

quickActions.label: Add Resolution Time Analysis
quickActions.prompt: Show average resolution times for phone tickets by category
